basic_details.job_title: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years for ME/M.Tech/MS. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD candidates as per Government of India norms.

qualification.details: M.Tech./ME/MS in Structural Engineering or Applied Mechanics or similar specializations with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% of marks, and GATE qualification not older than 5 years from the last date of submission of application/NET qualification. B.Tech./BE in Civil Engineering or relevant branches, 70% marks or 7.5 CPI in B.Tech/BE from institutes other than IITs/IISc with valid GATE score and 8.0 CPI in B.Tech./BE from IITs and IISc.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- pm for 1st and 2nd year and Rs. 42,000 pm for 3rd year + HRA as applicable
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- pm for 1st and 2nd year + HRA as applicable Rs. 42,000 pm for 3rd year + HRA as applicable

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/PhD position Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/PhD position Job 2026 Notificati

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna JRF/PhD position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the project investigator by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an M.Tech./ME/MS in Structural Engineering or Applied Mechanics with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% marks and GATE/NET qualification, or a B.Tech./BE in Civil Engineering with 70% marks or 7.5 CPI and a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 32 years for ME/M.Tech/MS. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD candidates as per GOI norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF/PhD position?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first and second year, and Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year, plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How should I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email to the project investigator, Dr. Nitin Kumar, with the subject line "Research Position DAM-1525". Ensure all required documents and a statement of purpose are attached.

faq.question: Q6. What documents need to be attached with the email application?
faq.answer: You need to attach a scanned PDF copy of the duly filled application form, self-attested scanned PDF copies of all supporting documents (degree certificates, mark-sheets, GATE scorecard, category certificate if applicable), and copies of Scopus-indexed journal papers.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the JRF/PhD position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test and/or an Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the further details.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/PhD position advertised by IIT Patna.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.
